Emily Johnson
Los Angeles, CA

Summary
Dedicated customer service professional with over 5 years of experience in retail environments. Skilled in managing customer inquiries and ensuring satisfaction. Eager to transition into a warehouse role to broaden my skillset and contribute to team success.

Experience
Customer Service Representative  
ABC Retail Store, Los Angeles, CA  
March 2020 - Present  
- Handled customer requests and complaints in a fast-paced retail environment.  
- Maintained product displays and assisted in inventory counts.  
- Developed strong relationships with customers to ensure repeat business.  

Barista  
Café Good Vibes, Los Angeles, CA  
May 2018 - February 2020  
- Prepared coffee and food items for customers in a busy café setting.  
- Managed cash register and processed transactions efficiently.  
- Worked collaboratively with team members to meet daily sales goals.  

Sales Associate  
Fashion Outlet, Los Angeles, CA  
June 2015 - April 2018  
- Assisted customers with product selections and provided knowledgeable advice on merchandise.  
- Organized stockroom and ensured products were restocked on the sales floor.  
- Participated in inventory management and merchandising efforts.  

Certifications
- CPR and First Aid Certified (2022)

- Strong organizational abilities
- Proficient in cash handling and POS systems
